chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Karachi CP No.D-5012 of 2024 (Muhammad Naveed and others v. Government of Sindh and others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on Misc. No.22284/2024 2. For order on office objection No.01 3. For order on Misc. No.22285/2024 4. For hearing of main case 14.10.2024 Hafiz Maqsood Ahmed, advocate for the petitioners --------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. The petitioners, by way of the instant petition, have sought restoration of the subject property to its original shape by removing its outer boundary wall so that no hindrance is caused to their peaceful possession. The issue of removal of a boundary wall together with the possession of the petitioners being peaceful or otherwise involving a factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction; consequently the instant petition being misconcevied is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Nadir/PA*
